Brief_Summary: This document discusses a complainant, identified as a merchant of the Antiquities Service, who is involved in a dispute concerning a pension law. It highlights his involvement in works at the Temple, noting he was not a traditional laborer but an intermediary, and mentions his attached criminal record, suggesting a problematic history.
